title: MultipleSeriesRequest
description: Request body for fetching multiple time series.

seriesid.description: Array of BLS series IDs to retrieve. Version 2 supports up to 50 series; Version 1 supports up to 25 series.

startyear.description: First year of data to retrieve in YYYY format.

endyear.description: Last year of data to retrieve in YYYY format.

catalog.description: Include series catalog metadata in the response.

calculations.description: Include net change and percent change calculations.
